summary: First iteration end-to-end test of KreteOps ICF field management app. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases pass covering root, idempotent seed, jobs CRUD, 115 seeded tasks across 8 categories, default validation steps, AI-generated validation steps (Claude Sonnet 4.6 via emergentintegrations), step approve/delete, task-entry status logic (in_progress / rework / validated), AI fix-suggestion, and dashboard aggregations. Frontend: Onboarding -> manager lands on Dashboard, crew lands on FieldView, all data-testids present, tab switching works, 4 metric tiles render, rework list renders, 115 task rows show in admin and field views, TaskSheet opens with validation checklist (3 steps for Precon), pass/fail buttons and AI fix-it button work, entry submission updates task. Manager sees gen-ai/manual-add buttons; crew does NOT (readonly verified). Logout clears storage and returns to onboarding.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings on initial mount because ResponsiveContainer parent has 0 width during first render. Charts still render correctly after layout settles — cosmetic console noise only. Could be silenced by giving the chart wrapper a fixed min-height or default aspect.
The 'In Progress' StatChip badge (value=0) renders with a blue circle that visually overlaps the label baseline. Low-priority styling polish.

action_items: (Optional polish) Set a min-height on the Recharts ResponsiveContainer wrappers in Dashboard.jsx to eliminate width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings on first paint.
(Optional polish) Tweak StatChip styling for the In-Progress value badge so it doesn't visually overlap the chip label.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] / DB_NAME directly without defaults — good, fails fast. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY pulled via os.environ.get — fine.
Idempotent /api/seed correctly returns 'already_seeded' on re-run. force=true path nukes ALL validation_steps via empty filter — acceptable for demo seed but worth a comment in production.

create_entry status logic only marks 'validated' if estimated_qty is set; tasks where estimated_qty is None can only ever reach 'in_progress'. The dashboard earned_hours handles the no-qty case (uses status), so behavior is internally consistent. Confirmed behavior in tests.
All MongoDB reads use {'_id': 0} projection — no ObjectId serialization issues observed.
AI generate endpoint parses JSON via substring (first '{' to last '}') — robust enough; gracefully 500s with HTTPException on parse error.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via axios baseURL — correct. No hardcoded URLs found.
All required data-testid attributes from the review request are present and resolvable.
test_credentials: No auth required — onboarding stores name + role in localStorage. Tested as manager (Test Foreman) and crew (Test Crew2).
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed created Walls Abilene Intermediate SS job + 115 tasks + 427 default validation steps. Idempotent verified. Tests also created TEST_-prefixed task entries and manual steps; manual steps are deleted by their own test, TEST_ entries remain (harmless — they just contribute to dashboard counts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_kreteops_api.py — 16 tests, all green. Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_kreteops_api.py -v. AI tests (validation-step generate + fix-suggestion) hit the real Emergent LLM key against Claude Sonnet 4.6 and pass reliably — allow up to ~90s for the generate call. The DB has a couple of TEST_ task entries from this run; if total counts matter for future tests, either factor that in or POST /api/seed?force=true to reset. FieldView populates 115 task rows via async fetch — give it >2s after navigation before querying task-row selectors.
